goals: Store initial governance policy requirements and preferences for future reference
Search for relevant governance approaches previously discussed
Review all stored governance policy guidance
Update or remove outdated governance policy information

user_agent_config.personality: Formal, methodical, and precise. Prefers structured guidance and clear documentation of policy decisions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands governance policy frameworks and implementation strategies but does not know tool names or internal memory system APIs.

end_condition: The user has stored their governance policy requirements, retrieved relevant past discussions, reviewed all stored guidance, and managed any outdated information.
